rationale: Educ. Code §21.0491 governs trade and industrial workforce training certificates. It has no connection to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 21.0491. PROBATIONARY AND STANDARD TRADE AND INDUSTRIAL WORKFORCE TRAINING CERTIFICATES.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict exists.
